ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the variant is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "ref_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele */,
  "alt_allele" TEXT /* Alternative allele */,
  "asb_transcription_factors" TEXT /* Transcription factors showing allele-specific binding (ASB) */,
  "asb_cell_types" TEXT /* Cell types showing allele-specific binding (ASB) */,
  "ncoa1_human_fdr_ref" REAL /* False discovery rate (FDR) for NCOA1_HUMAN reference allele */,
  "ncoa1_human_fdr_alt" REAL /* False discovery rate (FDR) for NCOA1_HUMAN alternative allele */,
  "ncoa1_human_effect_size_ref" REAL /* Effect size for NCOA1_HUMAN reference allele */,
  "ncoa1_human_effect_size_alt" REAL /* Effect size for NCOA1_HUMAN alternative allele */,
  "variant_class" TEXT /* Class of the variant */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the variant */,
  "consequence" TEXT /* Consequence of the variant */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the variant */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene associated with the variant */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene associated with the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcription_factors" (
  "tf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription factor */,
  "tf_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcription factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transcription factor */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the transcription factor */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the transcription factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type */,
  "cell_type_group" TEXT /* Group of the cell type */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism of the cell type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_transcription_factors" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "tf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcription factor */,
  "binding_site" TEXT /* Binding site of the transcription factor */,
  "binding_affinity" REAL /* Binding affinity of the transcription factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id", "tf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_cell_types" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the variant in the cell type */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation of the variant in the cell type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id", "cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_gene_associations" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_info" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)
column_names: Chromosome where the variant is located
Position of the variant on the chromosome
False discovery rate (FDR) for NCOA1_HUMAN reference allele
False discovery rate (FDR) for NCOA1_HUMAN alternative allele
Effect size for NCOA1_HUMAN reference allele
Effect size for NCOA1_HUMAN alternative allele
Name of the gene associated with the variant
ID of the gene associated with the variant
Unique identifier for each transcription factor
Unique identifier for each cell type
Binding site of the transcription factor
Binding affinity of the transcription factor
Expression level of the variant in the cell type
Regulation of the variant in the cell type
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the variant being accessed
ID of the user accessing the variant
Date when the variant was accessed
Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding)
